description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof, surrounded by a row of tall, slender palm trees that add a tropical ambiance. The exterior is primarily composed of contrasting black and white surfaces, with large glass windows and open spaces that suggest an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor living. The front area includes a covered patio with outdoor seating and a dining table, creating a welcoming social space. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and featuring additional windows for ventilation and light. The side and rear views reveal a consistent use of vertical columns and open frameworks, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping is minimal, focusing on the dramatic effect of the palm trees and the geometric layout of the house.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large windows, and surrounded by tall palm trees. Features include a covered patio, open frameworks, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry, covered patio with outdoor seating, and a row of palm trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the house, the alignment of palm trees, and the vertical columns supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open framework, flat roof, and the continuation of palm trees along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals more windows, the setback upper story, and the geometric contrast of black and white surfaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered patio with outdoor seating, wide steps, and a minimalist door design, framed by geometric columns and shaded by palm trees.
